title: pongamia fruticosa
intro: Pongamia fruticosa, also known as the karanja tree, is a native plant species found in the tropical regions of Asia and Australia. It is a deciduous tree with medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities, which are attributed to the presence of compounds like pongamol and karanjol. The health benefits of Pongamia fruticosa include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as oil extracts and decoctions, are commonly used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
